name: createDocument
description: Creates a new empty Google Document. Optionally places it in a specific folder and adds initial text content.

parentFolderId.description: ID of folder where document should be created. If not provided, creates in Drive root.

initialContent.description: Initial content to add to the document. By default, markdown syntax is converted to formatted Google Docs content (headings, bold, italic, links, lists, etc.).

contentFormat.description: How to interpret initialContent. 'markdown' (default) converts markdown to formatted Google Docs content. 'raw' inserts the text as-is without any conversion.
